response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with ~15 years of professional development, current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js fullstack roles, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience — a rare and explicitly required skill. Strong testing culture (TDD, test frameworks he authored, workshops) and demonstrated breadth across databases, Docker/Kubernetes, and AWS align well with the role. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (no Nest.js or Kotlin mentioned) and should be easy to close given his polyglot track record.
strengths: Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience, matching the required AI agent skill
Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js + React experience across multiple senior roles
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test tooling, taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience listed (Java exposure appears limited and dated)
Frontend framework depth is mostly Ember.js; React experience appears in only one role
Significant investment in D language ecosystem, which is peripheral to this stack
